headline: Magnus Expands Access to 5-Day SAINT® Depression Therapy as Leading Health Systems Scale Nationwide Adoption
summary: BURLINGAME, Calif., May 05, 2026--Magnus Medical Inc., a pioneer in precision neuromodulation for brain health conditions, today announced growing commercial momentum as availability and access to its breakthrough SAINT® Depression Therapy increase, driven by expanding adoption among leading health systems, payer reimbursement, and patient demand.

content.title: Magnus Expands Access to 5-Day SAINT® Depression Therapy as Leading Health Systems Scale Nationwide Adoption
content.summary: BURLINGAME, Calif., May 05, 2026--Magnus Medical Inc., a pioneer in precision neuromodulation for brain health conditions, today announced growing commercial momentum as availability and access to its breakthrough SAINT® Depression Therapy increase, driven by expanding adoption among leading health systems, payer reimbursement, and patient demand.

thumbnail.caption: SAINT Depression Therapy is a non-invasive, non-medicated, accelerated treatment for depression. It is the only FDA-cleared, accelerated, rapid-remission treatment for major depressive disorder, achieving remission from depression in 79% of patients in an average of just 2.6 days.
